station_address: Falkland Road, 336, Sir Jamshedji Jeejeebhoy Rd, near Shepherd Road, Byculla East, Byculla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400008
text:
Indian Oil Petrol Pump on Sir Jamshedji Jeejabhoi Road, located in R Merchant Chowk is the closest Petrol Pump from Sir JJ Group Of Hospital Campus, Mumbai..

It's in some 500mtrs distance from Gate no.14 of sir JJ Hospital Campus..

They have Petrol,Diesel as well as PUC,Oil and free Air over there..

It seems like their QRcode is issue is still not solved..
Still facing issues while doing online payment..

This Petrol Pump remains open till late at night..

station_address: Falkland Road, 336, Sir Jamshedji Jeejeebhoy Rd, near Shepherd Road, Byculla East, Byculla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400008
text:
METER SCAM
Access 125  bs4 has fuel tank capacity of 5.6 including reserve and i got my tank full at 5.725 L when asked they are like access me to 6 L bhi jata h company kuch bhi bolti h.
I am using this scooter for past 8 years and always do a full tank i have never got a full tank above 5.3-5.4 L because there is always 200-300ml left in tank

text: Visited this petrol pump for a PUC check, but the person in charge kept me waiting for over 10 minutes because he said he wanted to have paan first before doing the PUC. Very unprofessional behavior. PUC is an essential service and should be handled with priority and responsibility.
